title: Distill Kimi K3 visual judgment into the site and visual-design skill

mainline.contradiction: Use one real Rossovia site redesign to distinguish Kimi K3 aesthetic judgments that are reproducible and transferable from one-off styling, then retain only the former in visual-design.
acceptance: The Principal accepts the site as a preferable, fit-for-use current treatment without direct symbolism or heavy retro costume; the subtle historical communal relation remains provisional.
A baseline and Kimi-informed implementation are compared through rendered evidence.
Only behavior-changing, cross-context visual judgment is added to visual-design, with a boundary probe and synchronized Sequence snapshot.

branches.title: Expose useful Work Cell progress while a run is active
branches.purpose: The Kimi implementation pass showed only process liveness until a hidden transport timeout settled.
branches.returnCondition: A provider-neutral event projection exposes phase, reasoning activity when available, tool activity, step usage, and failure without persisting raw hidden reasoning.
branches.mainlineDelta: Long Kimi-backed runs now expose bounded provider-neutral progress and a durable run-scoped trace without giving observation authority over execution.
